interfaces.name: TeamAuditEntryData
interfaces.description: Metadata for an audit entry with action team.*.

interfaces.name: TeamReviewRequestable
interfaces.description: Represents a team that can be requested to review a pull request.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the TeamReviewRequestable object.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: A unique, human-readable identifier for the team.

enums.name: TeamMemberOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which team member connections can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order team members by creation time.

values.name: LOGIN
values.description: Order team members by login.

values.name: MAINTAINER
values.description: A team maintainer has permission to add and remove team members.

values.name: MEMBER
values.description: A team member has no administrative permissions on the team.

enums.name: TeamMembershipType
enums.description: Defines which types of team members are included in the returned list. Can be one of IMMEDIATE, CHILD_TEAM or ALL.

values.name: ALL
values.description: Includes immediate and child team members for the team.

values.name: CHILD_TEAM
values.description: Includes only child team members for the team.

values.name: IMMEDIATE
values.description: Includes only immediate members of the team.

values.name: NOTIFICATIONS_DISABLED
values.description: No one will receive notifications.

values.name: NOTIFICATIONS_ENABLED
values.description: Everyone will receive notifications when the team is @mentioned.

enums.name: TeamOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which team connections can be ordered.

values.name: NAME
values.description: Allows ordering a list of teams by name.

values.name: SECRET
values.description: A secret team can only be seen by its members.

values.name: VISIBLE
values.description: A visible team can be seen and @mentioned by every member of the organization.

enums.name: TeamRepositoryOrderField
enums.description: Properties by which team repository connections can be ordered.

values.name: CREATED_AT
values.description: Order repositories by creation time.

values.name: NAME
values.description: Order repositories by name.

values.name: PERMISSION
values.description: Order repositories by permission.

values.name: PUSHED_AT
values.description: Order repositories by push time.

values.name: STARGAZERS
values.description: Order repositories by number of stargazers.

values.name: UPDATED_AT
values.description: Order repositories by update time.

values.name: LOAD_BALANCE
values.description: Balance review load across the entire team.
